summary: MOBILE GIF PICKER TEST - ALL TESTS PASSED. The GIF picker now appears correctly on mobile devices. Main agent's fixes (fixed positioning, 100ms delay for click-outside listener, close button, touch-manipulation class, z-[100]) are working as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: There are TWO GIF button elements in the DOM - one hidden (width/height 0) and one visible. The hidden one has data-testid='gif-button' but is not rendered. The visible one also has data-testid='gif-button' and is at position (60, 708) on mobile. This duplication may cause issues with automated testing but doesn't affect user experience.

The close button selector '.sm\:hidden button' returns false for visibility check even though the button is clearly visible on mobile. This is because the element has 'sm:hidden' class which means 'hidden on small screens and above' in Tailwind, but the actual implementation shows it on mobile. The selector logic may need review.
context_for_next_testing_agent: GIF picker on mobile is now working. The fix involved changing from absolute positioning to fixed positioning on mobile (inset-x-4 bottom-20). The visible GIF button is at position (60, 708) on a 390x844 mobile viewport. 40 trending GIFs load from Tenor API. Close button (X) works to dismiss the picker.

tests_performed.test: GIF picker appears when tapping GIF button
tests_performed.details: GIF button found at (60, 708), clicking opens picker with 40 GIF items

tests_performed.test: GIF picker shows trending GIFs from Tenor API
tests_performed.details: 40 trending GIFs loaded successfully from Tenor API

tests_performed.test: Tapping on a GIF sends it to conversation
tests_performed.details: Clicking on GIF item closes picker and sends GIF

tests_performed.test: Close button (X) works to dismiss picker
tests_performed.details: Close button found and clicking it closes the picker
